final_answer: I have processed the exchange for order #W9300146. The Desk Lamp has been swapped to the cheapest available Desk Lamp (Small, White) priced at $29.99, replacing the original Desk Lamp priced at $89.99. The price difference of $60.00 will be credited to your gift card. You get back $60.00 in total as a gift card credit.
